    }), "\n", _jsxs(_components.p, {
      children: ["WatermelonDB's documentation is explicit: implementing synchronization is one of the hardest parts of building with the library. The built-in ", _jsx(_components.code, {

    }), "\n", _jsxs(_components.ul, {

      }), "\n", _jsx(_components.li, {
        children: "The protocol pushes entire updated records rather than just changed fields, which is wasteful for large objects."
      }), "\n", _jsx(_components.li, {

      }), "\n", _jsx(_components.li, {

      children: "WatermelonDB was designed before the React Native New Architecture (Fabric renderer, TurboModules, Bridgeless mode). The library's JSI adapter helps performance but does not resolve the architectural mismatch."
    }), "\n", _jsx(_components.p, {
